title: WATCH:  Teen learns to ride bike with vocal support from teammates
fullText: Teen learns to ride bike with vocal support from teammatesA wholesome moment captured on camera as a teenager successfully rides a bike for the first time after being taught by his basketball teammates and coach in Fort Scott, Kansas.February 25, 2026
summary: A wholesome moment captured on camera as a teenager successfully rides a bike for the first time after being taught by his basketball teammates and coach in Fort Scott, Kansas.
